description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a sporty stance. The body is predominantly white with black accents, including a prominent rear spoiler, side mirrors, and lower trim. The front features sharp, angular headlights and a wide, aggressive grille, while the rear showcases dual exhausts and distinctive taillights. The car sits on large, multi-spoke alloy wheels, and the side profile reveals sculpted doors and a streamlined roofline. The windows are tinted, and the interior appears to have a dark, minimalist design with visible front seats and a steering wheel. Overall, the vehicle exudes a high-performance, luxury sports car aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, white coupe car with black accents, sporty styling, and a low, aerodynamic profile. Features include a rear spoiler, angular headlights, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, sharp headlights, and black side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted door, large wheels, and rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual exhausts, black spoiler, and distinctive taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the door, wheels, and spoiler.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
